page_content:
Formerly: CHEM143.

CHEM177 Introduction to Laboratory Practices and Research in the Chemical Sciences (2 Credits)

First semester laboratory course required for CHEM and BCHM majors. Introduction to laboratory techniques, including safety practices, scientific ethics, and presentation of current research topics. Prerequisite: Must have math eligibility of MATH120 or higher. Corequisite: CHEM146, CHEM131, or CHEM135.

Restriction: Must be in a major within CMNS-Chemistry & Biochemistry department; or permission of CMNS-Chemistry & Biochemistry department.

Credit Only Granted for. CHEM132, CHEM136, CHEM147, or CHEM177.
